reasoning: Elon Musk is currently the richest person in the world by a significant margin. Throughout 2025, his wealth has reached record heights, crossing $490 billion by mid-November (and some sources estimate even higher). While Larry Ellison briefly overtook him in September 2025 when Ellison's net worth spiked to ~$393 billion, Ellison's wealth dropped shortly after, and Musk has since expanded his lead significantly, meaning that Musk enjoys a cushion of around $100 billion. With roughly five weeks left until the December 31, 2025 resolution date, a $100 billion gap is practically insurmountable under normal market conditions. Barring an unprecedented black swan collapse in Tesla's stock isolated from the broader market, it is highly likely Musk will hold the #1 spot on the Bloomberg Billionaires Index on December 31.
